InvalidGreeting.documentation: This error is thrown when an invalid greeting value is provided.

cases.description: Parses simple RpcV2 Cbor errors

given.name: GreetingWithErrors
given.documentation:
This operation has three possible return values:

  1. A successful response in the form of GreetingWithErrorsOutput
  2. An InvalidGreeting error.
  3. A ComplexError error.

Implementations must be able to successfully take a response and properly deserialize successful and error responses.

ComplexError.documentation: This error is thrown when a request is invalid.

cases.description: Parses a complex error with no message member

cases.description: A `Content-Type` header should not be set if the response body is empty.
Clients should accept a CBOR empty struct if there is no output.

Clients should accept an empty body if there is no output and
should not raise an error if the `Content-Type` header is set.
When output is empty we write CBOR equivalent of {}

Serializes RpcV2 Cbor lists

given.name: RpcV2CborLists
given.documentation:
This test case serializes JSON lists for the following cases for both input and output:

  1. Normal lists.
  2. Normal sets.
  3. Lists of lists.
  4. Lists of structures.

Supports handling NaN float values.

Supports upcasting from a smaller byte representation of the same data type.

The client should skip over additional fields that are not part of the structure. This allows a
client generated against an older Smithy model to be able to communicate with a server that is
generated against a newer Smithy model.
Deserializes null values in maps
Deserializes null values in lists
